overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval waterfront town at dusk. The character moves from a narrow alley onto a wooden dock, then ascends a cobblestone path under a stone bridge to reach a fountain plaza, with overcast skies and atmospheric lighting throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley opening to waterfront promenade

events.description: exiting narrow building passage into open waterfront area
stepping onto wooden dock over calm water

agents.ego_description: walking along a narrow path beside a wooden building, emerging onto a cobblestone waterfront area

notable_agents.action: sitting on a chair outside the building wearing a yellow hat

entered.detail: weathered wooden wall of a medieval building with small windows
confined walkway between stone and wooden structures
irregular stone paving leading toward the water
wooden pier structure extending over the calm water
mature tree with silvery-green leaves near the water's edge
large stone castle complex visible across the water through the haze

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow passage beside a wooden building, opening onto a cobblestone waterfront promenade. An NPC sits on a chair to the left as the character approaches a wooden dock extending over calm water, with a distant castle visible through the overcast haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden pier extending over calm water

events.description: reaching the end of the dock and turning around to face the shore

agents.ego_description: walking to the end of the wooden dock and turning to view the waterfront town from over the water

entered.detail: vertical wooden pilings supporting the dock structure
small wooden vessel moored near the dock edge
tranquil blue water surrounding the pier

segments.scene_description: Walking along the wooden planks of the pier over calm water, the character reaches the end and turns around. The dock posts line the right side while a small boat floats nearby, and the distant castle remains visible across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal path with stone houses and torch lighting

events.description: stepping off wooden dock back onto cobblestone shore path

agents.ego_description: walking along the shore path past a stone house with warm torchlight illuminating the entrance

notable_agents.action: standing near a torch post by the stone house entrance

entered.detail: medieval stone building with red roof tiles and lit windows
wooden post with burning flame providing warm light
large ornate stone bridge with multiple arches spanning the background

segments.scene_description: Returning to land from the dock, the character walks along a cobblestone path past a stone house with a torch-bearing NPC outside. The path leads toward an impressive stone bridge arch visible in the distance, with red flowering bushes appearing along the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone path passing under a large stone bridge with dense vegetation

events.description: passing underneath the stone bridge archway
NPC runs past from left to right crossing the path

agents.ego_description: walking up the cobblestone path under the bridge, passing vibrant red flowering bushes

notable_agents.action: running past the player character up the stone path

entered.detail: dense shrubs with bright red blossoms lining the path
rough stone retaining wall supporting the hillside

segments.scene_description: The path leads under the massive stone bridge, creating a sheltered area with low light. Dense red flowering bushes line the left side while a stone wall rises on the right. An NPC runs past in the opposite direction as the character continues ascending the cobblestone path.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved stone staircase leading to a fountain plaza

events.description: transitioning from cobblestone path to curved stone stairs
reaching the fountain plaza at the top of the stairs

agents.ego_description: climbing the curved stone steps toward an ornate stone fountain, then walking around it

entered.detail: sweeping stone staircase with wide steps ascending the hillside
ornate tiered fountain with gothic arches and flowing water
mature spreading tree with dense foliage above the fountain

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the bridge, the character ascends a sweeping curved stone staircase. At the top, an ornate stone fountain with gothic detailing stands beneath a large olive tree. The character approaches and circles the fountain, with misty mountains visible in the distant background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow waterfront passage that gradually ascends into an elevated town plaza. It begins beside a wooden building in a tight alley, opening onto a cobblestone promenade where the camera follows the character out onto a wooden pier extending over calm water toward a distant, hazy castle. As the character turns back from the dock, the scene shifts toward a cobblestone path lined with stone houses and red flowering bushes, leading the way toward a massive stone bridge. The camera then moves into the low light of the bridge's shelter, passing a running NPC before ascending a sweeping curved staircase. Finally, the environment opens up at the top of the stairs to reveal an ornate gothic fountain beneath a large olive tree, with misty mountains framing the distant horizon.
